author: florianwoelki
description: Add icons to anything in Obsidian, including files, folders, and text.

manifest.author: Florian Woelki
manifest.description: Add icons to anything you desire in Obsidian, including files, folders, and text.
manifest.name: Iconize

name: Iconize

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: avoid edge cases by @Moyf in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/628
* fix: avoid inline title wrapper side scrolling on mobile by @henrik in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/629
* fix: title wrapper margins by @henrik in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/632

## New Contributors
* @Moyf made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/628
* @henrik made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/629

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.14.6...2.14.7

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: duplication of imported custom icons by @wallynm in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/621
* fix: on mobile, custom rules doesn't load at startup by @Mara-Li in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/624
* fix: several issues for internal plugins (added a toggle for modifications to the internal plugins)

## New Contributors
* @wallynm made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/621

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.14.5...2.14.6

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixed lagginess for notes with many icons by @mdiller in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/618

## New Contributors
* @mdiller made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/618

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.14.4...2.14.5

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.14.2...2.14.3

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- feat(ui): add custom ResetButtonComponent for a more native feeling
- refactor: increase maximum font size to 64px (#514)
- fix: issue with icons not having correct size in link (#511)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.14.1...2.14.2

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: add native support for Lucide icons (#452) **Note:** this will also fix syncing issues if you only use Lucide icons!
* feat(ui): add setting to refresh icons from frontmatter by @adamhl8 in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/507 (#423)

## New Contributors
* @adamhl8 made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/507

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.13.0...2.14.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Feat: add icons in outline functionality (#334)
- Feat: add custom first event system
- Fix: issue with padding-top for inline title icons
- Fix: issue with title icons and ITS theme (#500)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.12.1...2.13.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Fix: issue with transform for icon in line (#488)
- Fix: issue with transform for icon in line (#491)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Refactor: remove `none` option for emoji style
- Refactor: optimise UI for custom rules (#351)
- Fix(settings): issue when switching emoji style icon tabs and titles are also affected even when they are turned off (#466)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.11.14...2.12.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- fix: issue with changing emoji style leading to wrong title icon #466

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- refactor: optimize emoji regex

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.11.10...2.11.11

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: add functionality of having icons in links (#355)

* fix: issue with pinning and unpinning notes vanishes icon in tab (#391)
* fix: issue with icon getting removed when frontmatter changes (#375)

* @kalyncoose made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/386

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

* Refactor: update logo in preview image by @LiamSwayne in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/374
* Feat(icon-pack): add Feather Icons to supported list on website by @s-crypt in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/361
* Feat(icon-pack): add Octicons by @m-stoeckel in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/376

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Feat: add icon identifier customization for customizing the icon identifier used in notes
- Refactor: removed inheritance functionality and replaced it with custom rules + added migration script that will execute once you start obsidian and use inheritance icons

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.9.1...2.10.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Fix: icon alignment with text #341

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Feat: add functionality of setting color for an individual color #124 
- Refactor: minimize header for custom rule settings


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.8.2...2.9.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Feat: add prefix to icon pack display for icon packs
- Feat: add native html title which is a basic tooltip for icons for files and folders
- Feat: add feathericons
- Refactor: optimize descriptions and overall structure of settings
- Fix: issue with twemoji parsing for icon title #338 
- Fix: rendering of icon in table #336 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.8.1...2.8.2

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: add coolicons by @whiterqbbit in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/325
* Feat: increase recent icons limit to 25 (#305)
* Feat: add `data-icon` attribute to live preview icons
* Fix(editor): issue with shortcodes in invalid nodes (#312)
* Fix: issue with icon color and font size for custom rule (#319)
* Fix: console error when adding or removing emojis
* Fix: issue with modifying path and non existing directories (#317)

## New Contributors
* @whiterqbbit made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/325

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.8.0...2.8.1

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: add icons in live-preview
* Feat: add new option for toggling icons in notes (#303)
* Fix: issue with duplicated icons in icon picker modal (#294)
* Fix: issue with setting emoji when updating custom rule (#298)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.7.3...2.8.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Fix: issue with emoji and text, parsed as emoji (#288)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.7.2...2.7.3

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Fix: issue with frontmatter property type (#290)
- Fix: issue with changing font size of editor and icon above title (#287)

### Developer Updates

- Fix: issue with floating point numbers in setting font-size for svg

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.7.1...2.7.2

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Fix: issue with using emoji in a frontmatter property (#284)
- Docs: add documentation of using frontmatter with an icon for a file

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.7.0...2.7.1

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: add possibility to add icons based on frontmatter property `icon` (#38)
* Refactor: use `iconize` class instead of `obsidian-icon-folder`

## Developer Updates
* Feat: add icon caching mechanism for not refetching items
* Refactor: renamed all files to use kebab-case

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.6.1...2.7.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Fix: issue with inline title icon and minimal theme #277 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.6.0...2.6.1

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: add icons and emojis support in notes by @nebspacefarer in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/273
* Fix: issue with preview mode and icon above title functionality

## New Contributors
* @nebspacefarer made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/273

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.5.2...2.6.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Feat: add support for emojis above titles

### Developer Updates

- Refactor: adjust `icon.getByPath` to respect emojis
- Refactor: adjust `icon.getIconByPath` to return emojis as a string as well

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.5.1...2.5.2

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Fix: issues with icons above titles for mobile
- Fix: issue with removing icon pack on mobile

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Feat: add the ability to add the icon of the file to the top of the title (like in notion)
- Fix: issue with icon in tab not updated for custom rules #269 
- Fix: issue with notes that have the same name switches icon #266

### Developer Updates

- Test: Iconize now has a test coverage of over ~60%
- Refactor: most of the files are now in kebab-case
- Refactor: improve API for icon tabs
- Refactor: cleaned up custom rule functionality
- CI: add unit test pipeline

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix: issue with icon tabs and reading mode (#259)
* Fix: issue with renaming and metadata being null for custom rules
* Fix: issue with not normalized icon names for background checker

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.4.1...2.4.2

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: disable notice of missing icon packs when background check is enabled
* Feat: add notice for background check
* Refactor: optimize background check
* Refactor: spelling mistake (XML to SVG)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.4.0...2.4.1

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: add new icon packs (predefined boxicons and rpg-awesome) by @Lisandra-dev in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/260
* Feat: add [documentation page](https://florianwoelki.github.io/obsidian-iconize/)
* Feat: add [background checker](https://florianwoelki.github.io/obsidian-iconize/guide/syncing.html) for fixing Obsidian sync (#242)
* Feat: add toggle setting for background checker
* Refactor: change preview image in README file
* Fix: issue with icon pack and extra path causing issues with font awesome icon packs (#256)

### Developer updates
* Feat: add `data-icon` attribute to nodes to identify nodes with icons (value will be the icon)
* Feat: add `getIconFromElement` function to dom library
* Refactor: improve `removeFromAllFiles` custom rule function


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.3.1...2.4.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix: issue with downloading simple-icons icon pack #253  
* Fix: issue with themes and modal text color #250  

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.3.0...2.3.1

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: add support for file-path in rules by @Lisandra-dev
* Feat: add reordering functionality for custom rules by @FlorianWoelki and @Lisandra-dev #71 
* Refactor: update icon packs by @binaryDiv in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/238
* Refactor: change default icon pack path to `.obsidian/icons`
* Fix: issue with custom rule over inheritance #225
* Fix: issue with file opening and changing icon twice in one tab #208 
* Fix: issue with extra path and downloading predefined icon packs #241 
* Fix: issue with renaming and moving files

## New Contributors
* @binaryDiv made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/pull/238

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-iconize/compare/2.2.1...2.3.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

- Fix: issue with not normalized icon names (#221)
- Fix: issue with adding icon packs on the first run
- Fix: issue with removing icon packs on the first run

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-icon-folder/compare/2.2.0...2.2.1

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:

releases.description:

releases.author: FlorianWoelki

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: icon in open file tabs #149 
* Fix: compatible with Obsidian 1.2.0 version by @bytemain in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-icon-folder/pull/165
* Fix: issue that some icons are not shown correctly #158 
* Fix: corrupt icons in icon pack stops loading icon pack completely #160 
* Fix: same icon for custom rule #141 
* Refactor codebase for easier usage

## New Contributors
* @bytemain made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-icon-folder/pull/165

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-icon-folder/compare/1.7.0...2.0.0

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Added Lucide icons as a pre-supported icon pack (thanks to @PrinceHeadache for the PR)
* Added functionality to edit custom rules (#150)
* Changed from yarn to pnpm

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
**NOTE**: This plugin now includes the functionality for changing the style of the emojis. If you used Twemojis before, please go to the plugin's settings and change the emoji style to Twemoji to see your emojis again.

This release includes the following changes:
* Added option to disable Twemoji and toggle between native and twemoji emojis #139
* Fixed Twemoji CDN link #145
* Issue with loading some icons -- related to #110 #111

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Fixed issue with parsing twemojis #140

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* New SVG parser that should be able to parse a lot of SVG files (#135 #134 #133)
* Dev: Migrate from yarn to pnpm

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Improved the SVG extraction to handle more use cases for svgs

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Fix: default color not set after clicking on default color #127 
* Fix: issue with removing directories when path is changed to root #132 
* Fix: issue with stroke and fill of svgs #131

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Fixed: Recently used icons are not shown
* Fixed: Twemojis are not selectable when no icon packs are created #126 
* Fixed: Negative slider option for extra margin #108 
* Fixed: wrong default color when no color is selected #127

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Add button disabled when custom rule input field is empty
* Add twemoji name search for icon picker #123 
* Upgrade twemoji to 14.0.2 #125 
* Remove custom icon picker and use obsidian made color picker
* Remove code for changing tab icon to custom set icon

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Add simple icons as default icon pack
* Fixed minor styling issues for Obsidian 1.0 (#120)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Added functionality for seeing icons in starred pane (#103)
* Fixed issue with the same name (#106)
* Fixed issue with file name in icon (#105)
* Fixed issue with restarting obsidian
* Fixed issue with type in colorizing icons
* Fixed alignment of icons
* Fixed issues with file renaming
* Fixed issue with colorizing custom rule icons after restart (#102)
* Fixed issue with `extraPadding` migration
* Replaced padding with margin

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Fixed issue where icons are not applied to drag and rearrange button if they have a prefix of >2 characters

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Added drag to rearrange icon (#75)
* Fixed issue with icon-brew icon pack (#100)
* Fixed issue with loading icons (#92)
* Fixed issue with moving directories if they exist (#85)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Upgraded obsidian dependency to `0.15.4`
* Fixed issue with colonizing all icons by default (#98)
* Fixed minor issues with types

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Fixed issue with resizing icons (#96)
* Fixed issue with colorizing icons (#96)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Added icon packs that can be directly downloaded from the `obsidian-icon-folder` repository
* Added icon brew icon pack (#95)
* Added more warning messages
* Fixed issue with recently used icons order
* Fixed not loaded icons in icon modal
* Fixed handling of duplicated icon names
* Fixed issue with loading icons while creating an icon pack
* Improved mobile experience for icon modal

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Fixed issue with inheritance and custom rules
* Fixed loading of custom icons with a lot of directories (#81)
* Refactored custom rule functionality

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This update includes the following changes:
* Updated text of notice for wrong icon pack folder path (#84)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This update includes the following changes:
* Added plugin name to Notice #82 (thanks to @cfurrow)
* Fixed issue with multiple types of custom rules #77 
* Fixed issue with removing custom rules that have the same rule

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This update includes the following changes:
* Added notice for saving icon folder path
* Added migration guide if icon folder path is still in `plugins/...`
* Fixed issue with default path

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This new version includes the following changes:
* Fixed issue with double inheritance #70 
* Fixed issue with icon path outside the obsidian path #73 
* Removed icons from search because it disabled sort functionality as mentioned in #79 

Migration Guide:
Make sure to add a `.obsidian` prefix in the path.

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following fixes:
* Fix dependency security issues
* Fix prioritization of icon rules (thanks to @Mara-Li)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following new features/fixes:

* Add functionality for custom rules work only for files, folders, or both (#57)
* Add functionality for adding colors for custom rules (#51)
* Change title and description of padding setting
* Refactor settings tab

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This small release includes the following features/fixes:

* Add fullpath log to warning when icon is missing
* Add "fix icon pack" button to normalize the icon pack (fixes #59 and maybe #61)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release contains a couple of changes:

* Change description of plugin
* Revert to the old inheritance functionality #63 
* Add custom rules for setting icons #58 
* Remove icon pack dependencies

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following updates:

* Add warning message for missing icon
* Fix logic issue with inheritance

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release fixes a minor svg import issue:

* Fix issues with SVGs that have numbers as a starting character

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Thank you all for reporting these issues!

* Fixes issue with downloading icon packs on mobile #55 
* Fixes issue with adjusting the size of icons #56 
* Add new dev environment

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release fixes several issues. Thank you all for reporting!

* Fix issues with images in README file
* Add section in README for using with other icon plugins
* Add section in README for sync issue
* Remove twemoji from predefined icon packs in README file
* Fix issues with loading SVGs
* Reverse the order of recently used icons
* Fix issue with not able to use twemoji without a icon pack

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Thank you to @Mara-Li for testing the new update.

This release includes huge updates and changes.
* Added functionality to add custom icon packs and icons #42
* Added functionality to download predefined icon packs (font-awesome and remix-icons)
* Added migration script for easier migrating from an earlier version
* Fixed issue with icon-shortcodes #45

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes minor bug fixes:

- #35 and #36 should be fixed with this update

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release adds recently used icons to the icon selection modal.

This suggestion came from the ticket #32

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release tries to fixes some minor issues that are related to upgrading from an earlier obsidian-icon-folder version.

* Fixes #30 #29 #26

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Thank you for reporting the issue #25 

* fix: issue with modal item suggestion (#25)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Thank you for reporting the issues #24 

* fix: issue with parsing some twemoji emojis (#24)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Thank you to the issues #22 and #23 for reporting this style issue

* fix: styling issue for other modals (#22 #23)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Thank you to @Mara-Li for quick fixing a styling issue

* build: bump to version v1.0.51 #21

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Fix:
* Fixed issue with icon duplication while refreshing the plugin

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Fix:
* Fixed issue with adding icon to file (rather than folder) (#9 )

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Feature:
* Added ability to set options for showing fontawesome/remixicons packs in modal
* Added fontawesome icon pack

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
Bugfix:
* Fixed `Icons missing on workspace reload` (#7)

Feature:
* Added settings tab for enabling different icon packs (preparation for #8 and #5)

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description: Initial release.
